member.name: T:Entropic.Core.TodoStatus
member.summary: Provider-agnostic domain types. Identity rules: Project identity = (Provider, ProjectPath) Session identity = (Provider, SessionId) All fallible operations use Result<T,string> — no exceptions for control flow.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.IProviderPort
member.summary: Hexagonal architecture port interfaces. Core domain depends on these abstractions; adapters implement them.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.DebouncedFileWatcher
member.summary: Debounced file system watcher. Watches a directory for changes and invokes a callback with configurable debounce.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.Aggregator
member.summary: Merges data from multiple providers, deduplicating projects by (provider, projectPath) and sessions by (provider, sessionId).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.PathUtils.validatePath(System.String)
member.summary: Validate whether a path exists on the filesystem.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.PathUtils.reconstructPath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reconstruct a real filesystem path from a flattened directory name. Checks metadata.json first, then uses greedy filesystem matching.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.PathUtils.buildAndValidatePath(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Greedy path reconstruction: walk the filesystem trying multi-part matches.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.PathUtils.listDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: List directory contents, returning Error if directory doesn't exist.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.PathUtils.createFlattenedPath(System.String)
member.summary: Replace path separators and colons with hyphens.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.PathUtils
member.summary: Flattened directory path reconstruction and creation. Claude (and other providers) flatten project paths into directory names by replacing path separators with hyphens.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.TodoManager.loadTodos(System.String)
member.summary: Load todos from a JSON file.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.TodoManager.persistTodos(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.Todo})
member.summary: Persist todos to a JSON file at the specified path.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.TodoManager.countByStatus(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.Session})
member.summary: Count todos by status across sessions.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.TodoManager.sortSessionsByDate(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.Session})
member.summary: Sort sessions by last modification time, most recent first.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.TodoManager.displayText(Entropic.Core.Todo)
member.summary: Get display text for a todo: uses ActiveForm when in-progress, else Content.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.TodoManager.statusPriority(Entropic.Core.TodoStatus)
member.summary: Status priority for sorting: InProgress first, then Pending, then Completed.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.TodoManager
member.summary: Sorting, filtering, and status logic for TODOs.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.JsonlParser.parseUpdatePlanJsonl(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String}})
member.summary: Parse an update_plan style JSONL file (used by Codex and Gemini). Returns sessionId, updatedAt, project identifier, and todos.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.JsonlParser.computeJsonlSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Compute a signature for a directory of JSONL files (count + max mtime).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.JsonlParser.listJsonlFiles(System.String)
member.summary: Recursively find all .jsonl files under a directory (max depth 6).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.JsonlParser.normalizeStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Normalize a status string to TodoStatus.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.JsonlParser.tryParseJson(System.String)
member.summary: Safely parse a single JSON line, returning None on failure.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.JsonlParser
member.summary: Shared JSONL parsing utilities used by Codex and Gemini adapters.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Preferences.getDefaultDryRun(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Get default dry-run setting (default: true).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Preferences.getRepairThreshold(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Get repair threshold (default: 5).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Preferences.getBool(System.String,System.Boolean,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Get a bool value from prefs.json.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Preferences.getInt(System.String,System.Int32,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Get an int value from prefs.json.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Preferences.getString(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String})
member.summary: Get a string value from prefs.json.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.Preferences
member.summary: JSON file-based configuration persistence.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.ProviderDetection.claudePaths
member.summary: Get standard paths for each provider.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.ProviderDetection.detect
member.summary: Detect which provider data directories exist on the local machine.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.ProviderDetection
member.summary: Auto-detection of installed AI coding agent data directories.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.repairProjectMetadata(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run full repair across all todo sessions.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.resolveSession(System.String,System.String,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run all 5 strategies in priority order for a single session.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.tryResolveByLogFile(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Strategy 5: Check logs/current_todos.json for session→project mapping.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.tryResolveByEnvVars(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Strategy 4: Scan JSONL for cwd/pwd/workspace environment patterns.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.tryResolveByContent(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Strategy 3: Scan JSONL content for "Working directory:" pattern.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.tryResolveByJsonl(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{System.String},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Strategy 2: Match JSONL filename in project directories.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies.tryResolveBySidecar(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Strategy 1: Read sidecar meta file for session→project mapping.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.RepairStrategies
member.summary: Repair strategies for resolving orphaned todo sessions to project paths. Ported from TypeScript repair.ts — 5 resolution strategies in priority order.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Diagnostics.repairAll(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.IProviderPort},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Run repair across all providers (REQ-DGN-003, REQ-DGN-004).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Diagnostics.shouldPromptRepair(Entropic.Core.Diagnostics.DiagnosticReport,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if startup repair prompt should be shown (REQ-DGN-002).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Diagnostics.collectAll(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.IProviderPort})
member.summary: Collect diagnostics from all providers (REQ-DGN-001, REQ-DGN-005).

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.Diagnostics
member.summary: Diagnostics and repair orchestration across all providers.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.SessionManager.deleteEmptySessions(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.Session})
member.summary: Batch-delete all empty sessions (zero todos) from a project (REQ-SES-010). Returns (successes, failures) counts.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.SessionManager.loadHistory(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Load JSONL chat history for a session (REQ-SES-008). Returns (role, truncated_content) pairs.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.SessionManager.deleteSession(Entropic.Core.Session)
member.summary: Delete a session's data file (REQ-SES-007).

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.SessionManager.mergeSessions(Entropic.Core.Session,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.Session})
member.summary: Merge multiple sessions into a target session (REQ-SES-006). Returns the merged session and counts of duplicate/new todos.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.SessionManager.writeProjectMapping(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write session-to-project mapping to sidecar metadata file.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.SessionManager.readProjectMapping(System.String)
member.summary: Read session-to-project mapping from sidecar metadata file (REQ-SES-004).

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.SessionManager
member.summary: Session lifecycle management: mapping, merge, deletion, history.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.ScriptReferences
member.summary: References to functionality implemented in PowerShell/Bash/TypeScript scripts. These requirements are satisfied by code outside the .NET codebase.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.Adapters.ClaudeAdapter
member.summary: Claude Code provider adapter. Reads ~/.claude/projects/ and ~/.claude/todos/ directories.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.Adapters.CodexAdapter
member.summary: OpenAI Codex provider adapter. Reads ~/.codex/sessions/ directories, parsing rollout-*.jsonl files.

member.name: T:Entropic.Core.Adapters.GeminiAdapter
member.summary: Google Gemini provider adapter. Reads ~/.gemini/sessions/*.jsonl, using the slug field as project identifier.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Git.GitIntegration.getCommitHistory(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get commit history for discovered repos.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Git.GitIntegration.createOnDemandLoader(System.String)
member.summary: Lazy loader: fetches git data only when requested, not at startup.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Git.GitIntegration.summarize(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Entropic.Core.Git.GitRepoStatus})
member.summary: Compute aggregate statistics across all discovered repos.

member.name: M:Entropic.Core.Git.GitIntegration.discoverRepos(System.String)
member.summary: Discover git repositories under a root path. Skips the root directory itself if it has .git (e.g. home dir dotfiles repo).
